Implemented and validated the DIA exception notification mechanism refinement.

This PR includes:
- Reused the existing Dataverse repository path for notification handling.
- Added Dataverse configuration lookup for sender and recipient notification settings.
- Added sender queue resolution.
- Added recipient parsing from semicolon-separated configuration values.
- Added activity party creation for sender and recipients.
- Added Dataverse email record creation.
- Added SendEmail execution through Dataverse.
- Wired the DIA failure notification flow into the actual notification mechanism.
- Added options-based configuration for DIA exception notification settings.
- Added unit test coverage for log-only, missing configuration, missing sender queue, invalid recipient configuration, wrapper flow, and happy path email send scenarios.
- Addressed SonarQube cleanup findings for the notification refinement changes.

Validation:
- Build succeeded.
- Unit tests passed: 21/21.
- SonarQube Quality Gate passed.
- All required PR checks succeeded.
- No merge conflicts.

Notes:
- This PR is separate from the existing green SPESTG-480 baseline PR.
- The existing baseline branch was kept untouched.
